title: Ability to select individual gmail emails to create tasks on monday board
excerpt: Add feature to selectively create tasks from specific emails. I don’t want all emails from a certain sender to create a task; I want to be able to select important emails and send it to Monday from Gmail.

posts.author: jillian_stag (Jillian Lewandowski )
posts.cookedHtml: Add feature to selectively create tasks from specific emails. I don’t want all emails from a certain sender to create a task; I want to be able to select important emails and send it to Monday from Gmail.

posts.author: Valeriia.H (Valeriia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi¡ Great question! You can now do exactly that with Email to Tasks for monday
It lets you pick specific emails and turn them into monday items with one click — you can even customize the fields before sending them to your board.

Give it a go here:
Try it on monday.com Marketplace
